name: Filter 8
description: Multimode 4-pole OTA filter with eight simultaneous 45°-spaced outputs. Four cascaded lowpasses plus pole-mixed HP1, band-boost+notch, phase shifter and BP4. Self-oscillates as an 8-phase sine VCO with 1V/oct.

controls.name: LOW/AUDIO Switch
controls.description: Selects filter/VCO audio range or slew-modifier/VCLFO range.
controls.detail: AUDIO: 22Hz–22kHz · LOW: 2.8mHz–180Hz · 1Hz at centre in LOW

controls.name: COARSE
controls.description: Sets filter/oscillator frequency. 22Hz–22kHz in audio when FINE centred.

controls.name: FINE
controls.description: 5 % fine-tune around COARSE. Roughly ±6 semitones in audio.
controls.detail: 5% of COARSE range · centre = no offset

controls.name: RESONANCE
controls.description: Feedback from output back to input. Above ~3 o'clock self-oscillates (panel mark).
controls.detail: Unique circuit: no LF loss as resonance rises

controls.name: EXP. FM
controls.description: Polariser for the EFM CV input. Second exponential FM path with depth.

controls.name: LIN. FM
controls.description: Polariser for the LFM CV input. ~±7%/V — 'tonal' FM that holds pitch centre.

controls.name: AC Switch
controls.description: AC-couples the LFM input to reject DC drift during audio-rate linear FM.
controls.detail: Engage for clean linear FM · bypass for DC control

controls.name: RES. MOD.
controls.description: Polariser for the resonance CV input.

controls.name: COMP. Switch
controls.description: Enables gain compensation: all outputs equal amplitude when self-oscillating.
controls.detail: OFF: unity gain per output · ON: matched amplitude for 8-phase VCO use

controls.name: HOLD Switch
controls.description: Manually freezes filter core, or enables/disables the HOLD gate input.
controls.detail: Toggles manually · with HOLD patched, switch routes the gate

controls.name: V/OCT Trimmer
controls.detail: Target: 4 octaves between 0V and +4V on V/OCT

controls.name: RES. Trimmer
controls.description: Front-panel trim for self-oscillation amplitude at max resonance.

inputs.name: V/OCT.
inputs.description: Precision 1V/oct exponential FM. Usable as VCO pitch input.

inputs.name: EFM
inputs.description: Second exponential FM input, scaled by EXP. FM polariser knob.

inputs.name: LFM
inputs.description: Linear FM input, polarised by LIN. FM knob. AC-coupleable via AC switch.

inputs.name: RES. MOD.
inputs.description: Resonance modulation input, polarised by RES. MOD. knob.

inputs.name: IN (×2)
inputs.description: Two identical signal inputs, mixed internally. Can clip on rich high-level signals as a deliberate drive effect. Unpatched for pure oscillator mode.

inputs.name: HOLD
inputs.description: Rising edge freezes filter core at current state. Schmitt-triggered for weak/slow signals.

inputs.name: PING
inputs.description: Rising edge above +3V 'strikes' the filter core for percussive ping tones. Set resonance just below self-osc.

outputs.name: BB+N
outputs.description: Band-boost + notch. Boost just below cutoff, cut just above. Wavefolder-like at high res.

outputs.name: PS
outputs.description: Phase shifter: 3-pole allpass summed with input. One-stage phaser response.

outputs.name: BP4
outputs.description: 4-pole bandpass. Purest sine at self-oscillation. 360° (0°) phase.

behaviors.name: 8-phase sine VCO
behaviors.description: Self-oscillates with 1V/oct tracking over ≥5 octaves. All eight outputs emit sine waves separated by 45°. With COMP engaged, amplitudes match — a complete 8-phase oscillator bank.

behaviors.name: Simultaneous multimode
behaviors.description: Every jack emits its response at all times. Patching LP4 and HP1 to separate destinations gives independent LP/HP filtering of the same signal, useful for bi-timbral voices.

behaviors.name: Resonance without LF loss
behaviors.description: Unique feedback topology keeps low-frequency content intact as resonance rises, unlike classic OTA filters that thin out. Lets you push resonance without bass drop.

behaviors.name: Input mix/drive
behaviors.description: Input jacks sum internally — no mixer needed. Hot signals can clip the core; when resonance adds gain this becomes musical distortion. Lower amplitudes to avoid, or embrace it.

behaviors.name: Filter ping
behaviors.trigger: rising edge → PING · res just below self-osc
behaviors.description: Each output generates a different ping timbre: LP1–LP4 have percussive transients (kick-drum material), BP4 is purest (bongo/tom), BB+N behaves best with COMP on. COMP off elsewhere to avoid transient distortion.

behaviors.name: Hold freeze
behaviors.description: Freezes the filter core at its instantaneous state. Halts slow modulations; at audio rate creates sync-like effects. Driving HOLD with audio pulses in oscillator mode yields FM-sync hybrid tones.

behaviors.name: Linear FM with AC coupling
behaviors.description: LFM keeps perceived pitch centred during deep modulation. AC switch removes DC drift so the fundamental doesn't wander. Rev D firmware fix removed a freeze bug at ~+10V LFM.

behaviors.name: LF slew modifier / 8-phase LFO
behaviors.description: In LOW mode the filter slews incoming envelopes or gates. Resonance adds bounce. Self-oscillating LOW gives an 8-phase LFO array for quadrature-plus-rich modulation.

behaviors.name: Output distortion as drive
behaviors.description: Because outputs are unity gain (COMP off), removing harmonics can raise amplitude and clip. Useful as intentional overdrive on saws/pulses through LP4.

patchIdeas.name: Resonating envelope bouncer
patchIdeas.patch: LOW range · attenuated envelope → IN · LP1 out · add resonance for bounce on transients · switch to AUDIO to superimpose an audio-rate component on the envelope for unique hybrid modulation
patchIdeas.diagram:
Filter 8:
* LOW/AUDIO: LOW
* RESONANCE: ~2 o'clock

- Envelope (Out) >> Attenuator (In)
- Attenuator (Out) >> Filter 8 (IN)
- Filter 8 (LP1) >> VCA (CV) // bouncing envelope

patchIdeas.name: Hold-modulated FM bells
patchIdeas.patch: AUDIO · res max (oscillator mode) · audio source → HOLD (switch engaged) · tune Filter 8 and source to a just interval · apply matched V/oct FM · produces 'bell' and 'synthetic bass' tones somewhere between linear FM and hard sync
patchIdeas.diagram:
Filter 8:
* LOW/AUDIO: AUDIO
* RESONANCE: max
* HOLD switch: ON

- Sequencer (Pitch) p> Filter 8 (V/OCT.)
- Sequencer (Pitch) p> Modulator VCO (V/Oct)
- Modulator VCO (Out) -> Filter 8 (HOLD)
- Filter 8 (BP4) -> VCA (In)

patchIdeas.name: Feedback drive
patchIdeas.patch: Audio source → IN · LP4 → attenuator → spare IN (feedback) · attenuator sets 'drive' · swap in a VCA on feedback path for voltage-controlled tone · try different outputs as feedback source for timbre variation
patchIdeas.diagram:
Filter 8:
* LOW/AUDIO: AUDIO
* RESONANCE: high

- VCO (Out) -> Filter 8 (IN)
- Filter 8 (LP4) -> VCA (In)
- Envelope (Out) >> VCA (CV) // VC drive amount
- VCA (Out) -> Filter 8 (IN)
- Filter 8 (LP4) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Saw-wave 8-phase VCO
patchIdeas.patch: AUDIO · res max · inputs unpatched · BP4 → EFM input (max EXP. FM) · LP2 and BB+N become near-perfect saw waves · pitch tracks with FM depth affecting V/oct · a chaotic saw bank
patchIdeas.diagram:
Filter 8:
* LOW/AUDIO: AUDIO
* RESONANCE: max
* COMP.: ON
* EXP. FM: max

- Sequencer (Pitch) p> Filter 8 (V/OCT.)
- Filter 8 (BP4) >> Filter 8 (EFM) // waveshape feedback
- Filter 8 (LP2) -> External Filter (In) // saw-like
- Filter 8 (BB+N) -> Mixer (In)

patchIdeas.name: Multi-timbral kick + bongo ping
patchIdeas.patch: AUDIO · res just past 3 o'clock panel mark · COMP off · trigger → PING · LP4 drives the kick (big transient) · BP4 drives bongo-like tom · each output is its own drum voice from the same strike
patchIdeas.diagram:
Filter 8:
* LOW/AUDIO: AUDIO
* RESONANCE: just past 3 o'clock
* COMP.: OFF

- Clock (Out) t> Filter 8 (PING)
- LFO (Out) >> Filter 8 (V/OCT.) // pitch tuning
- Filter 8 (LP4) -> Mixer (In) // kick
- Filter 8 (BP4) -> Mixer (In) // bongo

patchIdeas.name: Phaser voice
patchIdeas.patch: AUDIO · moderate res · audio → IN · PS output = built-in one-stage phaser · slowly modulate V/OCT with an LFO for classic phaser sweep · chain a second Filter 8 for deeper phasing
patchIdeas.diagram:
Filter 8:
* LOW/AUDIO: AUDIO
* RESONANCE: moderate

- VCO (Out) -> Filter 8 (IN)
- LFO (Out) >> Filter 8 (V/OCT.)
- Filter 8 (PS) -> Mixer (In) // phaser voice

patchIdeas.name: Custom response via pole mixing
patchIdeas.patch: Audio → IN · send several LP outputs + IN into external VC mixer · use different modulation on each channel to morph the response in real time · recreate or exceed vintage multimode filters
patchIdeas.diagram:
Filter 8:
* LOW/AUDIO: AUDIO
* RESONANCE: taste

- VCO (Out) -> Filter 8 (IN)
- Filter 8 (LP1) -> VC Mixer (In 1)
- Filter 8 (LP2) -> VC Mixer (In 2)
- Filter 8 (LP4) -> VC Mixer (In 3)
- Filter 8 (HP1) -> VC Mixer (In 4)
- LFO 1 (Out) >> VC Mixer (CV 1)
- LFO 2 (Out) >> VC Mixer (CV 2)
- VC Mixer (Out) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: 8-phase LFO bus
patchIdeas.patch: LOW · res max · COMP on · inputs unpatched · eight 45°-offset LFOs · route to eight destinations (pan, FX send, filter, wavefolder, etc.) for phase-related global motion
patchIdeas.diagram:
Filter 8:
* LOW/AUDIO: LOW
* RESONANCE: max
* COMP.: ON

- Filter 8 (LP1) >> Pan (CV)
- Filter 8 (LP2) >> VCA (CV)
- Filter 8 (LP3) >> External Filter (Cutoff)
- Filter 8 (LP4) >> FX (Time)
- Filter 8 (HP1) >> VCO (FM)
- Filter 8 (BB+N) >> Wavefolder (CV)
- Filter 8 (PS) >> External Filter (Res)
- Filter 8 (BP4) >> VCA (CV)

patchIdeas.name: Sync-effect via HOLD
patchIdeas.patch: AUDIO · res mid · audio → IN · another VCO square → HOLD · HOLD switch routing ON · filter core freezes on each rising edge → sync-like rhythmic stutter on the filtered audio · detune HOLD source for beating
patchIdeas.diagram:
Filter 8:
* LOW/AUDIO: AUDIO
* RESONANCE: ~noon
* HOLD switch: ON

- VCO A (Out) -> Filter 8 (IN)
- VCO B (Square) g> Filter 8 (HOLD)
- Filter 8 (LP4) -> VCA (In)

patchIdeas.name: Decaying 8-phase sine modulator
patchIdeas.patch: LOW · res near self-osc · trigger → PING · ping excites a decaying multi-phase sine burst across all outputs · patch pairs to destinations for gently-ringing organic modulation on key events
patchIdeas.diagram:
Filter 8:
* LOW/AUDIO: LOW
* RESONANCE: just past 3 o'clock

- Gate Seq (Out) t> Filter 8 (PING)
- Filter 8 (LP1) >> External Filter (Cutoff)
- Filter 8 (LP3) >> VCA (CV)
- Filter 8 (BP4) >> Pan (CV)
